examples: The caterpillar made into a butterfly.
They made the garage into a gym.
They made the room into a studio.
She made the fabric into a dress.
He made his hobby into a career.
example_translate: Он превратил своё хобби в карьеру.
make into.synonyms: Превращать, преобразовывать (во что-либо) - transform, convert, change
